transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Aria. How can I help?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, I’d like to schedule an appointment for next Monday at 4 PM to get a chipped filling fixed.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: May I have your name please

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your appointment is confirmed for Monday, June first at four point zero PM for a chipped filling. Your confirmation ID is BSD one zero zero two. We look forward to seeing you, Jordan. Have a great day.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Thank you, see you then. Goodbye.
